author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Fix #600: SharedWriter::{add,remove}_{label,blocker,relation} short-circuit before write_commit_push when no change is needed. Method signatures changed to Result<bool> (true=mutated, false=no-op). commands::{deps,label,relate} writer branches now print differentiated 'already exists' / 'not found' messages matching their non-writer counterparts. Tests: 1888 lib + 2864 bin pass. New regression tests cover all six mutations. Also fixed 20 pre-existing clippy::pedantic warnings in unrelated files since clippy -D warnings now passes.
